Container.Name: togetherplay
Container.Overview: Watch your media together, in real time.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Togetherplay web interface.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for config.json and other app data. Your settings survive here across container updates.

Config.Name: Downloads Directory
Config.Description: Where yt-dlp saves downloaded YouTube videos. Set ytdlpDownloadDir to /downloads in the admin panel.

Config.Name: DATA_DIR
Config.Description: Internal path where config.json is stored. Must match the container path for the Data Directory volume above.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Admin panel password. Leave blank to auto-generate one on first boot — check container logs for the generated password, then update it in the admin panel.

Config.Name: Discord Client ID
Config.Description: Optional. Your Discord application client ID for Discord Activity support. Can also be set in the admin panel after first boot.

Config.Name: Discord Client Secret
Config.Description: Optional. Your Discord application client secret for Discord Activity support. Can also be set in the admin panel after first boot.
